articles.title: BBVA and OpenAI collaborate to transform global banking
articles.summary: BBVA has partnered with OpenAI to revolutionize global banking by integrating AI technology into its operations, aiming to enhance customer experience and improve internal processes. This collaboration is expected to enable the development of more personalized and efficient banking services. By leveraging OpenAI's innovative capabilities, BBVA seeks to stay at the forefront of the banking industry's digital transformation.

articles.title: BNY builds “AI for everyone, everywhere” with OpenAI
articles.summary: BNY Mellon has partnered with OpenAI to make artificial intelligence more accessible, aiming to bring "AI for everyone, everywhere" through innovative financial solutions. This collaboration is expected to drive technological advancements and improve customer experiences. By leveraging OpenAI's capabilities, BNY Mellon can enhance its services and stay ahead in the rapidly evolving fintech landscape.

articles.title: How We Used Codex to Ship Sora for Android in 28 Days
articles.summary: The team behind Sora leveraged Codex, a cutting-edge AI-powered coding tool, to rapidly develop and ship the Android version of their app in just 28 days. Codex's automated coding capabilities enabled the team to work efficiently, streamlining the development process and reducing the time-to-market. This achievement showcases the potential of AI-driven coding tools to accelerate app development and innovation.

articles.title: Advancing science and math with GPT-5.2
articles.summary: Researchers have unveiled GPT-5.2, a cutting-edge AI model that promises to accelerate scientific breakthroughs in math and science. This innovative technology has the potential to automate complex calculations, simulate experiments, and even make new discoveries, revolutionizing the way scientists approach problem-solving. By harnessing the power of GPT-5.2, scientists can unlock new insights and drive progress in various fields, from physics to biology.

articles.title: Introducing GPT-5.2
articles.summary: Researchers have unveiled GPT-5.2, a significant upgrade to the GPT series, boasting enhanced language understanding and generation capabilities. This new model is expected to revolutionize natural language processing tasks, such as text summarization and conversation systems. With GPT-5.2, users can anticipate more accurate and human-like interactions with AI-powered tools and applications.

articles.title: Improved Gemini audio models for powerful voice experiences
articles.summary: Google has upgraded its Gemini audio models, enabling more accurate and efficient voice recognition for a range of applications. The improved models can better handle complex audio scenarios, such as noisy environments and diverse accents. This advancement has the potential to significantly enhance voice-powered experiences, from virtual assistants to voice-controlled devices.

articles.title: Deepening our partnership with the UK AI Security Institute
articles.summary: A leading tech company has announced a partnership with the UK AI Security Institute to enhance AI security and innovation. This collaboration aims to develop cutting-edge AI solutions and address emerging security challenges. The partnership is set to drive significant advancements in AI security research and development, benefiting both the UK and global tech communities.

articles.title: Strengthening our partnership with the UK government to support prosperity and security in the AI era
articles.summary: A major tech company has announced a strengthened partnership with the UK government to drive innovation and prosperity in the AI era. This collaboration aims to harness AI technology to boost economic growth, improve public services, and enhance national security. By working together, the company and the UK government seek to establish the UK as a global leader in responsible AI development and deployment.

articles.title: FACTS Benchmark Suite: Systematically evaluating the factuality of large language models
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced the FACTS Benchmark Suite, a comprehensive evaluation tool designed to assess the factuality of large language models. This suite aims to systematically test the accuracy and reliability of AI-generated content, helping to identify and mitigate the spread of misinformation. By using FACTS, developers can refine their language models to produce more trustworthy and factual outputs.

articles.title: Engineering more resilient crops for a warming climate
articles.summary: Scientists are developing more resilient crops to withstand the challenges of a warming climate, using innovative engineering techniques to improve their ability to thrive in extreme temperatures and weather conditions. This breakthrough has the potential to enhance global food security and mitigate the impacts of climate change on agriculture. By creating climate-resilient crops, researchers aim to ensure sustainable food production for future generations.

articles.title: New in llama.cpp: Model Management
articles.summary: The latest update to llama.cpp introduces model management capabilities, allowing users to easily manage and switch between different AI models. This innovation simplifies the process of experimenting with various models and fine-tuning their performance. With this update, developers can now efficiently deploy and test multiple models, streamlining their AI development workflow.

articles.title: Codex is Open Sourcing AI models
articles.summary: Codex is open-sourcing its AI models, making it easier for developers to access and integrate advanced artificial intelligence capabilities into their projects. This move is expected to accelerate innovation and collaboration in the AI community, driving new applications and use cases. By open-sourcing its models, Codex is democratizing access to AI technology and empowering a wider range of developers to build innovative solutions.

articles.title: Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker: Cost-efficient Frontier Multimodal Performance
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker, a cost-efficient AI model that achieves frontier multimodal performance, enabling efficient processing of various data types such as text, images, and audio. This innovation has the potential to significantly reduce computational costs while maintaining high performance levels. By doing so, Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker expands the accessibility of multimodal AI capabilities to a broader range of applications and industries.

articles.title: Introducing swift-huggingface: The Complete Swift Client for Hugging Face
articles.summary: The swift-huggingface library has been introduced, providing a comprehensive Swift client for Hugging Face, a popular platform for natural language processing (NLP) and machine learning models. This library enables Swift developers to easily integrate Hugging Face models into their apps, enhancing capabilities such as text analysis and generation. By bridging the gap between Swift and Hugging Face, developers can now build more intelligent and interactive iOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS applications.

articles.title: DeepMath: A lightweight math reasoning Agent with smolagents
articles.summary: DeepMath is a groundbreaking AI agent that utilizes smolagents to provide lightweight math reasoning capabilities, enabling efficient and accurate problem-solving. This innovative approach has the potential to revolutionize math education and research by making complex mathematical concepts more accessible. With DeepMath, users can expect improved performance and reduced computational requirements, paving the way for widespread adoption in various fields.

articles.title: Analysis finds anytime electricity from solar available as battery costs plummet
articles.summary: A new analysis reveals that anytime electricity from solar power is now a viable option due to plummeting battery costs. This breakthrough enables solar energy to be stored and used during periods of low sunlight or at night, making it a more reliable and efficient source of power. As a result, solar energy is becoming a more attractive alternative to traditional fossil fuels, driving a significant shift towards renewable energy.

articles.title: SSE sucks for transporting LLM tokens
articles.summary: Researchers have found that Server Sent Events (SSE) is inefficient for transporting large language model (LLM) tokens, highlighting the need for more effective data transfer methods. This discovery could impact the development of AI applications that rely on LLMs, such as chatbots and language translation tools. Alternative protocols may be necessary to improve the performance and scalability of these applications.

articles.title: OpenAI are quietly adopting skills, now available in ChatGPT and Codex CLI
articles.summary: OpenAI has introduced a new feature called "skills" in ChatGPT and Codex CLI, allowing users to access specialized capabilities and tools within the platforms. This update enables more precise and efficient interactions, enhancing the overall user experience. By integrating skills, OpenAI is expanding the potential applications of its AI models, making them more versatile and powerful tools.
